PREREQUISITE.NAME: CheckPerlExists
PREREQUISITE.EXTERNALNAME: Checking perl is installed on the OS.
PREREQUISITE.EXTERNALNAMEID: Checking perl is installed on the OS.

DESCRIPTION.TEXT: Checking perl version is greater than 5.28.1 .
DESCRIPTION.TEXTID: Checking perl version is greater than 5.28.1 .

PROBLEM.TEXT: perl needs to be greater than 5.28.1 .
PROBLEM.TEXTID: perl needs to be greater than 5.28.1 .

INFORMATION.TEXT: Check perl version is greater than 5.28.1 .
INFORMATION.TEXTID: Check perl version is greater than 5.28.1 .
